name: chatgpt-wrapper
description: Lightweight macOS ChatGPT web wrapper built with Electron and TypeScript.
author: ChatGPT Wrapper contributors

scripts.package:diagnose: npm run build && node scripts/package-mac.cjs --arch arm64 --unsigned --dir --timeout-ms 180000
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && node scripts/package-mac.cjs --arch arm64
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && node scripts/package-mac.cjs --arch x64
scripts.dist:mac:universal: npm run build && node scripts/package-mac.cjs --arch universal
scripts.dist:mac:arm64:unsigned: npm run build && node scripts/package-mac.cjs --arch arm64 --unsigned
scripts.dist:mac:x64:unsigned: npm run build && node scripts/package-mac.cjs --arch x64 --unsigned
scripts.dist:mac:universal:unsigned: npm run build && node scripts/package-mac.cjs --arch universal --unsigned
